  1224	  # Preloads relations for a collection of issues
  1225	  def self.load_relations(issues)
  1226	    if issues.any?
  1227	      relations =
  1228	        IssueRelation.where(
  1229	          "issue_from_id IN (:ids) OR issue_to_id IN (:ids)", :ids => issues.map(&:id)
  1230	        ).all
  1231	      issues.each do |issue|
  1232	        issue.instance_variable_set(
  1233	          :@relations,
  1234	          relations.select {|r| r.issue_from_id == issue.id || r.issue_to_id == issue.id}
  1235	        )
  1236	      end
  1237	    end
  1238	  end

  1242	    if issues.any?
  1243	      hours_by_issue_id = TimeEntry.visible(user).where(:issue_id => issues.map(&:id)).group(:issue_id).sum(:hours)
  1244	      issues.each do |issue|
  1245	        issue.instance_variable_set :@spent_hours, (hours_by_issue_id[issue.id] || 0.0)

  1250	  # Preloads visible total spent time for a collection of issues
  1251	  def self.load_visible_total_spent_hours(issues, user=User.current)
  1252	    if issues.any?
  1253	      hours_by_issue_id = TimeEntry.visible(user).joins(:issue).
  1254	        joins("JOIN #{Issue.table_name} parent ON parent.root_id = #{Issue.table_name}.root_id" +
  1255	          " AND parent.lft <= #{Issue.table_name}.lft AND parent.rgt >= #{Issue.table_name}.rgt").
  1256	        where("parent.id IN (?)", issues.map(&:id)).group("parent.id").sum(:hours)
  1257	      issues.each do |issue|
  1258	        issue.instance_variable_set :@total_spent_hours, (hours_by_issue_id[issue.id] || 0.0)

  1263	  # Preloads visible relations for a collection of issues
  1264	  def self.load_visible_relations(issues, user=User.current)
  1265	    if issues.any?
  1266	      issue_ids = issues.map(&:id)
  1267	      # Relations with issue_from in given issues and visible issue_to
  1268	      relations_from = IssueRelation.joins(:issue_to => :project).
  1269	                         where(visible_condition(user)).where(:issue_from_id => issue_ids).to_a
  1270	      # Relations with issue_to in given issues and visible issue_from
  1271	      relations_to = IssueRelation.joins(:issue_from => :project).
  1272	                         where(visible_condition(user)).
  1273	                         where(:issue_to_id => issue_ids).to_a
  1274	      issues.each do |issue|
  1275	        relations =
  1276	          relations_from.select {|relation| relation.issue_from_id == issue.id} +
  1277	          relations_to.select {|relation| relation.issue_to_id == issue.id}
  1278	
  1279	        issue.instance_variable_set :@relations, IssueRelation::Relations.new(issue, relations.sort)
  1280	      end
  1281	    end
  1282	  end

  1284	  # Returns a scope of the given issues and their descendants

  1286	    Issue.joins(

  1288	      " ON ancestors.root_id = #{Issue.table_name}.root_id" +
  1289	      " AND ancestors.lft <= #{Issue.table_name}.lft AND ancestors.rgt >= #{Issue.table_name}.rgt"
  1290	    ).
  1291	      where(:ancestors => {:id => issues.map(&:id)})
  1292	  end

  1734	  def after_project_change
  1735	    # Update project_id on related time entries
  1736	    TimeEntry.where({:issue_id => id}).update_all(["project_id = ?", project_id])
  1737	
  1738	    # Delete issue relations
  1739	    unless Setting.cross_project_issue_relations?
  1740	      relations_from.clear
  1741	      relations_to.clear
  1742	    end
  1743	
  1744	    # Move subtasks that were in the same project
  1745	    children.each do |child|
  1746	      next unless child.project_id == project_id_before_last_save
  1747	
  1748	      # Change project and keep project
  1749	      child.send :project=, project, true
  1750	      unless child.save
  1751	        errors.add(
  1752	          :base,
  1753	          l(:error_move_of_child_not_possible,
  1754	            :child => "##{child.id}",
  1755	            :errors => child.errors.full_messages.join(", "))
  1756	        )
  1757	        raise ActiveRecord::Rollback
  1758	      end
  1759	    end
  1760	  end

  1762	  # Callback for after the creation of an issue by copy
  1763	  # * adds a "copied to" relation with the copied issue
  1764	  # * copies subtasks from the copied issue
  1765	  def after_create_from_copy
  1766	    return unless copy? && !@after_create_from_copy_handled
  1767	
  1768	    if (@copied_from.project_id == project_id ||
  1769	          Setting.cross_project_issue_relations?) &&
  1770	        @copy_options[:link] != false
  1771	      if @current_journal
  1772	        @copied_from.init_journal(@current_journal.user)
  1773	      end
  1774	      relation =
  1775	        IssueRelation.new(:issue_from => @copied_from, :issue_to => self,
  1776	                          :relation_type => IssueRelation::TYPE_COPIED_TO)
  1777	      unless relation.save
  1778	        if logger
  1779	          logger.error(
  1780	            "Could not create relation while copying ##{@copied_from.id} to ##{id} " \
  1781	              "due to validation errors: #{relation.errors.full_messages.join(', ')}"
  1782	          )
  1783	        end
  1784	      end
  1785	    end
  1786	
  1787	    unless @copied_from.leaf? || @copy_options[:subtasks] == false
  1788	      copy_options = (@copy_options || {}).merge(:subtasks => false)
  1789	      copied_issue_ids = {@copied_from.id => self.id}
  1790	      @copied_from.reload.descendants.reorder("#{Issue.table_name}.lft").each do |child|
  1791	        # Do not copy self when copying an issue as a descendant of the copied issue
  1792	        next if child == self
  1793	        # Do not copy subtasks of issues that were not copied
  1794	        next unless copied_issue_ids[child.parent_id]
  1795	
  1796	        # Do not copy subtasks that are not visible to avoid potential disclosure of private data
  1797	        unless child.visible?
  1798	          if logger
  1799	            logger.error(
  1800	              "Subtask ##{child.id} was not copied during ##{@copied_from.id} copy " \
  1801	                "because it is not visible to the current user"
  1802	            )
  1803	          end
  1804	          next
  1805	        end
  1806	        copy = Issue.new.copy_from(child, copy_options)
  1807	        if @current_journal
  1808	          copy.init_journal(@current_journal.user)
  1809	        end
  1810	        copy.author = author
  1811	        copy.project = project
  1812	        copy.parent_issue_id = copied_issue_ids[child.parent_id]
  1813	        unless child.fixed_version.present? && child.fixed_version.status == 'open'
  1814	          copy.fixed_version_id = nil
  1815	        end
  1816	        unless child.assigned_to_id.present? &&
  1817	                 child.assigned_to.status == User::STATUS_ACTIVE
  1818	          copy.assigned_to = nil
  1819	        end
  1820	        unless copy.save
  1821	          if logger
  1822	            logger.error(
  1823	              "Could not copy subtask ##{child.id} " \
  1824	                "while copying ##{@copied_from.id} to ##{id} due to validation errors: " \
  1825	                "#{copy.errors.full_messages.join(', ')}"
  1826	            )
  1827	          end
  1828	          next
  1829	        end
  1830	        copied_issue_ids[child.id] = copy.id
  1831	      end
  1832	    end
  1833	    @after_create_from_copy_handled = true
  1834	  end

  1843	  # Updates the nested set for when an existing issue is moved
  1844	  def update_nested_set_attributes_on_parent_change
  1845	    former_parent_id = parent_id_before_last_save
  1846	    # delete invalid relations of all descendants
  1847	    self_and_descendants.each do |issue|
  1848	      issue.relations.each do |relation|
  1849	        relation.destroy unless relation.valid?
  1850	      end
  1851	    end
  1852	    # update former parent
  1853	    recalculate_attributes_for(former_parent_id) if former_parent_id
  1854	  end

  1856	  def update_parent_attributes
  1857	    if parent_id
  1858	      recalculate_attributes_for(parent_id)
  1859	      association(:parent).reset
  1860	    end
  1861	  end
  1862	
  1863	  def recalculate_attributes_for(issue_id)
  1864	    if issue_id && p = Issue.find_by_id(issue_id)
  1865	      if p.priority_derived?
  1866	        # priority = highest priority of open children
  1867	        # priority is left unchanged if all children are closed and there's no default priority defined
  1868	        if priority_position =
  1869	             p.children.open.joins(:priority).maximum("#{IssuePriority.table_name}.position")
  1870	          p.priority = IssuePriority.find_by_position(priority_position)
  1871	        elsif default_priority = IssuePriority.default
  1872	          p.priority = default_priority
  1873	        end
  1874	      end
  1875	
  1876	      if p.dates_derived?
  1877	        # start/due dates = lowest/highest dates of children
  1878	        p.start_date = p.children.minimum(:start_date)
  1879	        p.due_date = p.children.maximum(:due_date)
  1880	        if p.start_date && p.due_date && p.due_date < p.start_date
  1881	          p.start_date, p.due_date = p.due_date, p.start_date
  1882	        end
  1883	      end
  1884	
  1885	      if p.done_ratio_derived?
  1886	        # done ratio = average ratio of children weighted with their total estimated hours
  1887	        unless Issue.use_status_for_done_ratio? && p.status && p.status.default_done_ratio
  1888	          children = p.children.to_a
  1889	          if children.any?
  1890	            child_with_total_estimated_hours = children.select {|c| c.total_estimated_hours.to_f > 0.0}
  1891	            if child_with_total_estimated_hours.any?
  1892	              average = Rational(
  1893	                child_with_total_estimated_hours.sum(&:total_estimated_hours).to_s,
  1894	                child_with_total_estimated_hours.count
  1895	              )
  1896	            else
  1897	              average = Rational(1)
  1898	            end
  1899	            done = children.sum do |c|
  1900	              estimated = Rational(c.total_estimated_hours.to_f.to_s)
  1901	              estimated = average unless estimated > 0.0
  1902	              ratio = c.closed? ? 100 : (c.done_ratio || 0)
  1903	              estimated * ratio
  1904	            end
  1905	            progress = Rational(done, average * children.count)
  1906	            p.done_ratio = progress.floor
  1907	          end
  1908	        end
  1909	      end
  1910	
  1911	      # ancestors will be recursively updated
  1912	      p.save(:validate => false)
  1913	    end
  1914	  end

  1917	  class << self
  1918	    # Update issues so their versions are not pointing to a
  1919	    # fixed_version that is not shared with the issue's project
  1920	    def update_versions(conditions=nil)
  1921	      # Only need to update issues with a fixed_version from
  1922	      # a different project and that is not systemwide shared
  1923	      Issue.joins(:project, :fixed_version).
  1924	        where("#{Issue.table_name}.fixed_version_id IS NOT NULL" +
  1925	          " AND #{Issue.table_name}.project_id <> #{::Version.table_name}.project_id" +
  1926	          " AND #{::Version.table_name}.sharing <> 'system'").
  1927	        where(conditions).each do |issue|
  1928	        next if issue.project.nil? || issue.fixed_version.nil?
  1929	
  1930	        unless issue.project.shared_versions.include?(issue.fixed_version)
  1931	          retried = false
  1932	          begin
  1933	            issue.init_journal(User.current)
  1934	            issue.fixed_version = nil
  1935	            issue.save
  1936	          rescue ActiveRecord::StaleObjectError
  1937	            raise if retried
  1938	
  1939	            retried = true
  1940	            issue.reload
  1941	            retry
  1942	          end
  1943	        end
  1944	      end
  1945	    end
  1946	  end

  2011	      duplicates.each do |duplicate|
  2012	        # Reload is needed in case the duplicate was updated by a previous duplicate

  2014	        # Don't re-close it if it's already closed

  2016	
  2017	        # Same user and notes
  2018	        if @current_journal
  2019	          duplicate.init_journal(@current_journal.user, @current_journal.notes)
  2020	          duplicate.private_notes = @current_journal.private_notes

  2022	        duplicate.update_attribute :status, self.status

  2055	  def create_parent_issue_journal
  2056	    return if persisted? && !saved_change_to_parent_id?
  2057	    return if destroyed? && @without_nested_set_update
  2058	
  2059	    child_id = self.id

  2061	      if persisted?
  2062	        [parent_id_before_last_save, parent_id]
  2063	      elsif destroyed?
  2064	        [parent_id, nil]
  2065	      else
  2066	        [nil, parent_id]
  2067	      end
  2068	
  2069	    if old_parent_id.present?
  2070	      Issue.transaction do
  2071	        if old_parent_issue = Issue.visible.lock.find_by_id(old_parent_id)
  2072	          old_parent_issue.init_journal(User.current)
  2073	          old_parent_issue.current_journal.__send__(:add_attribute_detail, 'child_id', child_id, nil)
  2074	          old_parent_issue.save
  2075	        end

   253	  # AR#Persistence#destroy would raise and RecordNotFound exception
   254	  # if the issue was already deleted or updated (non matching lock_version).
   255	  # This is a problem when bulk deleting issues or deleting a project
   256	  # (because an issue may already be deleted if its parent was deleted
   257	  # first).
   258	  # The issue is reloaded by the nested_set before being deleted so
   259	  # the lock_version condition should not be an issue but we handle it.
   260	  def destroy
   261	    super
   262	  rescue ActiveRecord::StaleObjectError, ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   263	    # Stale or already deleted
   264	    begin
   265	      reload
   266	    rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   267	      # The issue was actually already deleted
   268	      @destroyed = true
   269	      return freeze
   270	    end
   271	    # The issue was stale, retry to destroy
   272	    super
   273	  end

   305	  # Copies attributes from another issue, arg can be an id or an Issue
   306	  def copy_from(arg, options={})
   307	    issue = arg.is_a?(Issue) ? arg : Issue.visible.find(arg)
   308	    self.attributes =
   309	      issue.attributes.dup.except(
   310	        "id", "root_id", "parent_id", "lft", "rgt",
   311	        "created_on", "updated_on", "status_id", "closed_on"
   312	      )
   313	    self.custom_field_values =
   314	      issue.custom_field_values.to_h do |v|
   315	        [v.custom_field_id, v.value]
   316	      end
   317	    if options[:keep_status]
   318	      self.status = issue.status
   319	    end
   320	    self.author = User.current
   321	    unless options[:attachments] == false
   322	      self.attachments = issue.attachments.map do |attachement|
   323	        attachement.copy(:container => self)
   324	      end
   325	    end
   326	
   327	    unless options[:watchers] == false
   328	      self.watcher_user_ids = issue.visible_watcher_users.select{|u| u.status == User::STATUS_ACTIVE}.map(&:id)
   329	    end
   330	    @copied_from = issue
   331	    @copy_options = options
   332	    self
   333	  end

   380	    end

   383	
   384	  # Sets the tracker.
   385	  # This will set the status to the default status of the new tracker if:
   386	  # * the status was the default for the previous tracker
   387	  # * or if the status was not part of the new tracker statuses
   388	  # * or the status was nil
   389	  def tracker=(tracker)
   390	    tracker_was = self.tracker
   391	    association(:tracker).writer(tracker)
   392	    if tracker != tracker_was
   393	      if status == tracker_was.try(:default_status)
   394	        self.status = nil
   395	      elsif status && tracker && !tracker.issue_status_ids.include?(status.id)
   396	        self.status = nil
   397	      end
   398	      reassign_custom_field_values
   399	      @workflow_rule_by_attribute = nil
   400	    end
   401	    self.status ||= default_status
   402	    self.tracker
   403	  end
   404	
   405	  def project_id=(project_id)
   406	    if project_id.to_s != self.project_id.to_s
   407	      self.project = (project_id.present? ? Project.find_by_id(project_id) : nil)
   408	    end
   409	    self.project_id
   410	  end
   411	
   412	  # Sets the project.
   413	  # Unless keep_tracker argument is set to true, this will change the tracker
   414	  # to the first tracker of the new project if the previous tracker is not part
   415	  # of the new project trackers.
   416	  # This will:
   417	  # * clear the fixed_version is it's no longer valid for the new project.
   418	  # * clear the parent issue if it's no longer valid for the new project.
   419	  # * set the category to the category with the same name in the new
   420	  #   project if it exists, or clear it if it doesn't.
   421	  # * for new issue, set the fixed_version to the project default version
   422	  #   if it's a valid fixed_version.
   423	  def project=(project, keep_tracker=false)
   424	    project_was = self.project
   425	    association(:project).writer(project)
   426	    if project != project_was
   427	      @safe_attribute_names = nil
   428	    end
   429	    if project_was && project && project_was != project
   430	      @assignable_versions = nil
   431	
   432	      unless keep_tracker || project.trackers.include?(tracker)
   433	        self.tracker = project.trackers.first
   434	      end
   435	      # Reassign to the category with same name if any
   436	      if category
   437	        self.category = project.issue_categories.find_by_name(category.name)
   438	      end
   439	      # Clear the assignee if not available in the new project for new issues (eg. copy)
   440	      # For existing issue, the previous assignee is still valid, so we keep it
   441	      if new_record? && assigned_to && !assignable_users.include?(assigned_to)
   442	        self.assigned_to_id = nil
   443	      end
   444	      # Keep the fixed_version if it's still valid in the new_project
   445	      if fixed_version && fixed_version.project != project && !project.shared_versions.include?(fixed_version)
   446	        self.fixed_version = nil
   447	      end
   448	      # Clear the parent task if it's no longer valid
   449	      unless valid_parent_project?
   450	        self.parent_issue_id = nil
   451	      end
   452	      reassign_custom_field_values
   453	      @workflow_rule_by_attribute = nil
   454	    end
   455	    # Set fixed_version to the project default version if it's valid
   456	    if new_record? && fixed_version.nil? && project && project.default_version_id?
   457	      if project.shared_versions.open.exists?(project.default_version_id)
   458	        self.fixed_version_id = project.default_version_id
   459	      end
   460	    end

   136	  # Returns a SQL conditions string used to find all issues visible by the specified user
   137	  def self.visible_condition(user, options={})
   138	    Project.allowed_to_condition(user, :view_issues, options) do |role, user|
   139	      sql =
   140	        if user.id && user.logged?
   141	          case role.issues_visibility
   142	          when 'all'
   143	            '1=1'
   144	          when 'default'
   145	            user_ids = [user.id] + user.groups.pluck(:id).compact
   146	            "(#{table_name}.is_private = #{connection.quoted_false} " \
   147	              "OR #{table_name}.author_id = #{user.id} " \
   148	              "OR #{table_name}.assigned_to_id IN (#{user_ids.join(',')}))"
   149	          when 'own'
   150	            user_ids = [user.id] + user.groups.pluck(:id).compact
   151	            "(#{table_name}.author_id = #{user.id} OR " \
   152	              "#{table_name}.assigned_to_id IN (#{user_ids.join(',')}))"
   153	          else
   154	            '1=0'
   155	          end
   156	        else
   157	          "(#{table_name}.is_private = #{connection.quoted_false})"
   158	        end
   159	      unless role.permissions_all_trackers?(:view_issues)
   160	        tracker_ids = role.permissions_tracker_ids(:view_issues)
   161	        if tracker_ids.any?
   162	          sql = "(#{sql} AND #{table_name}.tracker_id IN (#{tracker_ids.join(',')}))"
   163	        else
   164	          sql = '1=0'
   165	        end
   166	      end
   167	      sql
   168	    end
   169	  end
   170	
   171	  # Returns true if usr or current user is allowed to view the issue
   172	  def visible?(usr=nil)
   173	    (usr || User.current).allowed_to?(:view_issues, self.project) do |role, user|
   174	      visible =
   175	        if user.logged?
   176	          case role.issues_visibility
   177	          when 'all'
   178	            true
   179	          when 'default'
   180	            !self.is_private? || (self.author == user || user.is_or_belongs_to?(assigned_to))
   181	          when 'own'
   182	            self.author == user || user.is_or_belongs_to?(assigned_to)
   183	          else
   184	            false
   185	          end
   186	        else
   187	          !self.is_private?
   188	        end
   189	      unless role.permissions_all_trackers?(:view_issues)
   190	        visible &&= role.permissions_tracker_ids?(:view_issues, tracker_id)
   191	      end
   192	      visible
   193	    end
   194	  end

   129	      if circular_dependency?
   130	        errors.add :base, :circular_dependency
   131	      end
   132	      if issue_from.is_descendant_of?(issue_to) || issue_from.is_ancestor_of?(issue_to)
   133	        errors.add :base, :cant_link_an_issue_with_a_descendant
   134	      end
   135	    end
   136	  end
   137	
   138	  def other_issue(issue)
   139	    (self.issue_from_id == issue.id) ? issue_to : issue_from
   140	  end
   141	
   142	  # Returns the relation type for +issue+
   143	  def relation_type_for(issue)
   144	    if TYPES[relation_type]
   145	      if self.issue_from_id == issue.id
   146	        relation_type
   147	      else
   148	        TYPES[relation_type][:sym]
   149	      end
   150	    end
   151	  end
   152	
   153	  def label_for(issue)
   154	    if TYPES[relation_type]
   155	      TYPES[relation_type][(self.issue_from_id == issue.id) ? :name : :sym_name]
   156	    else
   157	      :unknow
   158	    end
   159	  end
   160	
   161	  def to_s(issue=nil)
   162	    issue ||= issue_from
   163	    issue_text = block_given? ? yield(other_issue(issue)) : "##{other_issue(issue).try(:id)}"
   164	    s = []
   165	    s << l(label_for(issue))
   166	    s << "(#{l('datetime.distance_in_words.x_days', :count => delay)})" if delay && delay != 0
   167	    s << issue_text
   168	    s.join(' ')
   169	  end
   170	
   171	  def css_classes_for(issue)
   172	    "rel-#{relation_type_for(issue)}"
   173	  end
   174	
   175	  def handle_issue_order
   176	    reverse_if_needed
   177	
   178	    if relation_type == TYPE_PRECEDES
   179	      self.delay ||= 0
   180	    else
   181	      self.delay = nil
   182	    end
   183	    set_issue_to_dates
   184	  end
   185	
   186	  def set_issue_to_dates(journal=nil)
   187	    soonest_start = self.successor_soonest_start
   188	    if soonest_start && issue_to
   189	      issue_to.reschedule_on!(soonest_start, journal)
   190	    end
   191	  end
   192	
   193	  def successor_soonest_start
   194	    if (self.relation_type == TYPE_PRECEDES) && delay && issue_from &&
   195	           (issue_from.start_date || issue_from.due_date)
   196	      add_working_days((issue_from.due_date || issue_from.start_date), (1 + delay))
   197	    end
   198	  end
   199	
   200	  def <=>(relation)
   201	    return nil unless relation.is_a?(IssueRelation)
   202	
   203	    r = TYPES[self.relation_type][:order] <=> TYPES[relation.relation_type][:order]
   204	    r == 0 ? id <=> relation.id : r
   205	  end
   206	
   207	  def init_journals(user)
   208	    issue_from.init_journal(user) if issue_from
   209	    issue_to.init_journal(user) if issue_to
   210	  end
   211	
   212	  private
   213	
   214	  # Reverses the relation if needed so that it gets stored in the proper way
   215	  # Should not be reversed before validation so that it can be displayed back
   216	  # as entered on new relation form.
   217	  #
   218	  # Orders relates relations by ID, so that uniqueness index in DB is triggered
   219	  # on concurrent access.
   220	  def reverse_if_needed
   221	    if TYPES.has_key?(relation_type) && TYPES[relation_type][:reverse]
   222	      issue_tmp = issue_to
   223	      self.issue_to = issue_from
   224	      self.issue_from = issue_tmp
   225	      self.relation_type = TYPES[relation_type][:reverse]
   226	
   227	    elsif relation_type == TYPE_RELATES && issue_from_id > issue_to_id
   228	      self.issue_to, self.issue_from = issue_from, issue_to
   229	    end
   230	  end
   231	
   232	  # Returns true if the relation would create a circular dependency
   233	  def circular_dependency?
   234	    case relation_type
   235	    when 'follows'
   236	      issue_from.would_reschedule? issue_to
   237	    when 'precedes'
   238	      issue_to.would_reschedule? issue_from
   239	    when 'blocked'
   240	      issue_from.blocks? issue_to
   241	    when 'blocks'
   242	      issue_to.blocks? issue_from
   243	    when 'relates'
   244	      self.class.where(issue_from_id: issue_to, issue_to_id: issue_from).present?
   245	    else
   246	      false
   247	    end
   248	  end
   249	
   250	  def call_issues_relation_added_callback
   251	    call_issues_callback :relation_added
   252	  end
   253	
   254	  def call_issues_relation_removed_callback
   255	    call_issues_callback :relation_removed
   256	  end
   257	
   258	  def call_issues_callback(name)
   259	    [issue_from, issue_to].each do |issue|
   260	      if issue
   261	        issue.send name, self
   262	      end
   263	    end
   264	  end
   265	end

    85	  # Returns a SQL condition to filter out journals with notes that are not visible to user

    91	  def initialize(*args)

   108	  def notes_and_details_empty?

   134	  # Returns the JournalDetail for the given attribute, or nil if the attribute

   211	
   212	  # Sets @custom_field instance variable on journals details using a single query
   213	  def self.preload_journals_details_custom_fields(journals)
   214	    field_ids = journals.map(&:details).flatten.select {|d| d.property == 'cf'}.map(&:prop_key).uniq
   215	    if field_ids.any?
   216	      fields_by_id = CustomField.where(:id => field_ids).index_by { |f| f.id }
   217	      journals.each do |journal|
   218	        journal.details.each do |detail|
   219	          if detail.property == 'cf'
   220	            detail.instance_variable_set :@custom_field, fields_by_id[detail.prop_key.to_i]
   221	          end
   222	        end
   223	      end
   224	    end
   225	    journals
   226	  end
   227	
   228	  # Stores the values of the attributes and custom fields of the journalized object
   229	  def start
   230	    if journalized
   231	      @attributes_before_change = journalized.journalized_attribute_names.index_with do |attribute|
   232	        journalized.send(attribute)
   233	      end
   234	      @custom_values_before_change = journalized.custom_field_values.to_h do |c|
   235	        [c.custom_field_id, c.value]
   236	      end
   237	    end
   238	    self
   239	  end
   240	
   241	  # Adds a journal detail for an attachment that was added or removed
   242	  def journalize_attachment(attachment, added_or_removed)
   243	    key = (added_or_removed == :removed ? :old_value : :value)
   244	    details <<
   245	      JournalDetail.new(
   246	        :property => 'attachment',
   247	        :prop_key => attachment.id,
   248	        key => attachment.filename
   249	      )
   250	  end
   251	
   252	  # Adds a journal detail for an issue relation that was added or removed
   253	  def journalize_relation(relation, added_or_removed)
   254	    key = (added_or_removed == :removed ? :old_value : :value)
   255	    details <<
   256	      JournalDetail.new(
   257	        :property  => 'relation',
   258	        :prop_key  => relation.relation_type_for(journalized),
   259	        key => relation.other_issue(journalized).try(:id)
   260	      )
   261	  end
   262	
   263	  private
   264	
   265	  # Generates journal details for attribute and custom field changes
   266	  def journalize_changes
   267	    # attributes changes
   268	    if @attributes_before_change
   269	      attrs = (journalized.journalized_attribute_names + @attributes_before_change.keys).uniq
   270	      attrs.each do |attribute|
   271	        before = @attributes_before_change[attribute]
   272	        after = journalized.send(attribute)
   273	        next if before == after || (before.blank? && after.blank?)
   274	
   275	        add_attribute_detail(attribute, before, after)
   276	      end
   277	    end
   278	    # custom fields changes
   279	    if @custom_values_before_change
   280	      values_by_custom_field_id = {}
   281	      @custom_values_before_change.each_key do |custom_field_id|
   282	        values_by_custom_field_id[custom_field_id] = nil
   283	      end
   284	      journalized.custom_field_values.each do |c|
   285	        values_by_custom_field_id[c.custom_field_id] = c.value
   286	      end
   287	
   288	      values_by_custom_field_id.each do |custom_field_id, after|
   289	        before = @custom_values_before_change[custom_field_id]
   290	        next if before == after || (before.blank? && after.blank?)
   291	
   292	        if before.is_a?(Array) || after.is_a?(Array)
   293	          before = [before] unless before.is_a?(Array)
   294	          after = [after] unless after.is_a?(Array)
   295	
   296	          # values removed
   297	          (before - after).reject(&:blank?).each do |value|
   298	            add_custom_field_detail(custom_field_id, value, nil)
   299	          end
   300	          # values added
   301	          (after - before).reject(&:blank?).each do |value|
   302	            add_custom_field_detail(custom_field_id, nil, value)
   303	          end
   304	        else
   305	          add_custom_field_detail(custom_field_id, before, after)
   306	        end
   307	      end
   308	    end
   309	    start
   310	  end
   311	
   312	  # Adds a journal detail for an attribute change
   313	  def add_attribute_detail(attribute, old_value, value)
   314	    add_detail('attr', attribute, old_value, value)
   315	  end
   316	
   317	  # Adds a journal detail for a custom field value change
   318	  def add_custom_field_detail(custom_field_id, old_value, value)
   319	    add_detail('cf', custom_field_id, old_value, value)
   320	  end
   321	
   322	  # Adds a journal detail
   323	  def add_detail(property, prop_key, old_value, value)
   324	    details <<
   325	      JournalDetail.new(
   326	        :property => property,
   327	        :prop_key => prop_key,
   328	        :old_value => old_value,
   329	        :value => value
   330	      )
   331	  end
   332	
   333	  def split_private_notes
   334	    if private_notes?
   335	      if notes.present?
   336	        if details.any?
   337	          # Split the journal (notes/changes) so we don't have half-private journals
   338	          journal = Journal.new(:journalized => journalized, :user => user, :notes => nil, :private_notes => false)
   339	          journal.details = details
   340	          journal.save
   341	          self.details = []
   342	          self.created_on = journal.created_on
   343	        end
   344	      else
   345	        # Blank notes should not be private
   346	        self.private_notes = false
   347	      end
   348	    end
   349	    true
   350	  end
   351	
   352	  def add_watcher
   353	    if user.is_a?(User) &&
   354	       user.pref.auto_watch_on?('issue_contributed_to') &&
   355	       valid_watcher?(user)
   356	      journalized.set_watcher(user, true)
   357	    end
   358	
   359	    assignee = journalized.assigned_to
   360	    if assignee.is_a?(User) &&
   361	       assignee.pref.auto_watch_on?('issue_assigned_to_me') &&
   362	       valid_watcher?(assignee)
   363	      journalized.set_watcher(assignee, true)
   364	    end
   365	  end
   366	
   367	  def valid_watcher?(user)
   368	    user.active? &&
   369	      user.allowed_to?(:add_issue_watchers, journalized.project) &&
   370	      journalized.valid_watcher?(user) &&
   371	      !journalized.watched_by?(user)
   372	  end
   373	
   374	  def send_notification
   375	    if notify? &&
   376	        (
   377	          Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_updated') ||
   378	          (Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_note_added') && notes.present?) ||
   379	          (Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_status_updated') && new_status.present?) ||
   380	          (Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_assigned_to_updated') && detail_for_attribute('assigned_to_id').present?) ||
   381	          (Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_priority_updated') && new_value_for('priority_id').present?) ||
   382	          (Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_fixed_version_updated') && detail_for_attribute('fixed_version_id').present?) ||
   383	          (Setting.notified_events.include?('issue_attachment_added') && details.any? {|d| d.property == 'attachment' && d.value })
   384	        )
   385	      Mailer.deliver_issue_edit(self)
   386	    end
   387	  end
   388	
   389	  def select_journal_visible_user(notified)
   390	    if private_notes?
   391	      notified = notified.select {|user| user.allowed_to?(:view_private_notes, journalized.project)}
   392	    end
   393	    notified
   394	  end
   395	end

    86	  # Returns a SQL conditions string used to find all time entries visible by the specified user
    87	  def self.visible_condition(user, options={})
    88	    Project.allowed_to_condition(user, :view_time_entries, options) do |role, user|
    89	      if role.time_entries_visibility == 'all'
    90	        nil
    91	      elsif role.time_entries_visibility == 'own' && user.id && user.logged?
    92	        "#{table_name}.user_id = #{user.id}"
    93	      else
    94	        '1=0'
    95	      end
    96	    end
    97	  end
    98	
    99	  # Returns true if user or current user is allowed to view the time entry
   100	  def visible?(user=nil)
   101	    (user || User.current).allowed_to?(:view_time_entries, self.project) do |role, user|
   102	      if role.time_entries_visibility == 'all'
   103	        true
   104	      elsif role.time_entries_visibility == 'own'
   105	        self.user == user
   106	      else
   107	        false
   108	      end
   109	    end
   110	  end
   111	
   112	  def initialize(attributes=nil, *args)
   113	    super
   114	    if new_record? && self.activity.nil?
   115	      self.activity_id = TimeEntryActivity.default_activity_id(User.current, self.project)
   116	      self.hours = nil if hours == 0
   117	    end
   118	  end
   119	
   120	  def safe_attributes=(attrs, user=User.current)
   121	    if attrs
   122	      attrs = super(attrs)
   123	      if issue_id_changed? && issue
   124	        if issue.visible?(user) && user.allowed_to?(:log_time, issue.project)
   125	          if attrs[:project_id].blank? && issue.project_id != project_id
   126	            self.project_id = issue.project_id
   127	          end
   128	          @invalid_issue_id = nil
   129	        elsif user.allowed_to?(:log_time, issue.project) && issue.assigned_to_id_changed? && issue.previous_assignee == User.current
   130	          current_assignee = issue.assigned_to
   131	          issue.assigned_to = issue.previous_assignee
   132	          unless issue.visible?(user)
   133	            @invalid_issue_id = issue_id
   134	          end
   135	          issue.assigned_to = current_assignee
   136	        else
   137	          @invalid_issue_id = issue_id
   138	        end
   139	      end
   140	      if user_id_changed? && user_id != author_id && !user.allowed_to?(:log_time_for_other_users, project)
   141	        @invalid_user_id = user_id
   142	      else
   143	        @invalid_user_id = nil
   144	      end
   145	
   146	      # Delete assigned custom fields not visible by the user
   147	      editable_custom_field_ids = editable_custom_field_values(user).map {|v| v.custom_field_id.to_s}
   148	      self.custom_field_values.delete_if do |c|
   149	        !editable_custom_field_ids.include?(c.custom_field.id.to_s)
   150	      end
   151	    end
   152	
   153	    attrs
   154	  end
   155	
   156	  def set_project_if_nil
   157	    self.project = issue.project if issue && project.nil?
   158	  end
   159	
   160	  def set_author_if_nil
   161	    self.author = User.current if author.nil?
   162	  end
   163	
   164	  def validate_time_entry
   165	    if hours
   166	      errors.add :hours, :invalid if hours < 0
   167	      errors.add :hours, :invalid if hours == 0.0 && hours_changed? && !Setting.timelog_accept_0_hours?
   168	
   169	      max_hours = Setting.timelog_max_hours_per_day.to_f
   170	      if hours_changed? && max_hours > 0.0
   171	        logged_hours = other_hours_with_same_user_and_day
   172	        if logged_hours + hours > max_hours
   173	          errors.add(
   174	            :base,
   175	            I18n.t(:error_exceeds_maximum_hours_per_day,
   176	                   :logged_hours => format_hours(logged_hours),
   177	                   :max_hours => format_hours(max_hours)))
   178	        end
   179	      end
   180	    end
   181	    errors.add :project_id, :invalid if project.nil?
   182	    if @invalid_user_id || (user_id_changed? && user_id != author_id && !self.assignable_users.map(&:id).include?(user_id))
   183	      errors.add :user_id, :invalid
   184	    end
   185	    errors.add :issue_id, :invalid if (issue_id && !issue) || (issue && project!=issue.project) || @invalid_issue_id
   186	    errors.add :activity_id, :inclusion if activity_id_changed? && project && !project.activities.include?(activity)
   187	    if spent_on && spent_on_changed? && user
   188	      errors.add :base, I18n.t(:error_spent_on_future_date) if !Setting.timelog_accept_future_dates? && (spent_on > user.today)
   189	    end
   190	    if !Setting.timelog_accept_closed_issues? && issue&.closed? && issue.was_closed?
   191	      errors.add :base, I18n.t(:error_spent_on_closed_issue)
   192	    end
   193	  end
   194	
   195	  def hours=(h)
   196	    write_attribute :hours, (h.is_a?(String) ? (h.to_hours || h) : h)
   197	  end
   198	
   199	  def hours
   200	    h = read_attribute(:hours)
   201	    if h.is_a?(Float)
   202	      # Convert the float value to a rational with a denominator of 60 to
   203	      # avoid floating point errors.
   204	      #
   205	      # Examples:
   206	      #  0.38333333333333336 => (23/60)   # 23m
   207	      #  0.9913888888888889  => (59/60)   # 59m 29s is rounded to 59m
   208	      #  0.9919444444444444  => (1/1)     # 59m 30s is rounded to 60m
   209	      (h * 60).round / 60r
   210	    else
   211	      h
   212	    end
   213	  end
   214	
   215	  # tyear, tmonth, tweek assigned where setting spent_on attributes
   216	  # these attributes make time aggregations easier
   217	  def spent_on=(date)
   218	    super
   219	    self.tyear = spent_on ? spent_on.year : nil
   220	    self.tmonth = spent_on ? spent_on.month : nil
   221	    self.tweek = spent_on ? Date.civil(spent_on.year, spent_on.month, spent_on.day).cweek : nil
   222	  end
   223	
   224	  # Returns true if the time entry can be edited by usr, otherwise false
   225	  def editable_by?(usr)
   226	    visible?(usr) && (
   227	      (usr == user && usr.allowed_to?(:edit_own_time_entries, project)) || usr.allowed_to?(:edit_time_entries, project)
   228	    )
   229	  end
   230	
   231	  # Returns the custom_field_values that can be edited by the given user
   232	  def editable_custom_field_values(user=nil)
   233	    visible_custom_field_values(user)
   234	  end
   235	
   236	  # Returns the custom fields that can be edited by the given user
   237	  def editable_custom_fields(user=nil)
   238	    editable_custom_field_values(user).map(&:custom_field).uniq
   239	  end
   240	
   241	  def visible_custom_field_values(user = nil)
   242	    user ||= User.current
   243	    custom_field_values.select do |value|
   244	      value.custom_field.visible_by?(project, user)
   245	    end
   246	  end
   247	
   248	  def assignable_users
   249	    users = []
   250	    if project
   251	      user_ids =
   252	        project.members.active.preload(:roles).filter_map do |m|
   253	          m.roles.any? {|role| role.allowed_to?(:log_time)} ? m.user_id : nil
   254	        end.uniq
   255	      users = User.where(:id => user_ids).sorted.to_a
   256	    end
   257	    users << User.current if User.current.logged? && !users.include?(User.current)
   258	    users
   259	  end
   260	
   261	  private
   262	
   263	  # Returns the hours that were logged in other time entries for the same user and the same day
   264	  def other_hours_with_same_user_and_day
   265	    if user_id && spent_on
   266	      TimeEntry.
   267	        where(:user_id => user_id, :spent_on => spent_on).
   268	        where.not(:id => id).
   269	        sum(:hours).to_f
   270	    else
   271	      0.0
   272	    end
   273	  end
   274	end

   101	  def before_create_cs
   102	    self.committer = self.class.to_utf8(self.committer, repository.repo_log_encoding)
   103	    self.comments =
   104	      self.class.normalize_comments(self.comments, repository.repo_log_encoding)

   106	  end

   108	  def scan_for_issues
   109	    scan_comment_for_issue_ids
   110	  end
   111	
   112	  TIMELOG_RE = /
   113	    (
   114	    ((\d+)(h|hours?))((\d+)(m|min)?)?
   115	    |
   116	    ((\d+)(h|hours?|m|min))
   117	    |
   118	    (\d+):(\d+)
   119	    |
   120	    (\d+([.,]\d+)?)h?
   121	    )
   122	    /x
   123	
   124	  def scan_comment_for_issue_ids
   125	    return if comments.blank?
   126	
   127	    # keywords used to reference issues
   128	    ref_keywords = Setting.commit_ref_keywords.downcase.split(",").collect(&:strip)
   129	    ref_keywords_any = ref_keywords.delete('*')
   130	
   131	    # keywords used to fix issues
   132	    fix_keywords = Setting.commit_update_keywords_array.pluck('keywords').flatten.compact
   133	    kw_regexp = (ref_keywords + fix_keywords).collect{|kw| Regexp.escape(kw)}.join("|")
   134	
   135	    referenced_issues = []
   136	    regexp =
   137	      %r{
   138	        ([\s(\[,-]|^)((#{kw_regexp})[\s:]+)?
   139	        (\#\d+(\s+@#{TIMELOG_RE})?([\s,;&]+\#\d+(\s+@#{TIMELOG_RE})?)*)
   140	        (?=[[:punct:]]|\s|<|$)
   141	      }xi
   142	    comments.scan(regexp) do |match|
   143	      action = match[2].to_s.downcase
   144	      refs   = match[3]
   145	      next unless action.present? || ref_keywords_any
   146	
   147	      refs.scan(/#(\d+)(\s+@#{TIMELOG_RE})?/o).each do |m|
   148	        issue = find_referenced_issue_by_id(m[0].to_i)
   149	        hours = m[2]
   150	        if issue && !issue_linked_to_same_commit?(issue)
   151	          referenced_issues << issue
   152	          # Don't update issues or log time when importing old commits
   153	          unless repository.created_on && committed_on && committed_on < repository.created_on
   154	            fix_issue(issue, action) if fix_keywords.include?(action)
   155	            log_time(issue, hours) if hours && Setting.commit_logtime_enabled?
   156	          end
   157	        end
   158	      end
   159	    end
   160	
   161	    referenced_issues.uniq!
   162	    self.issues = referenced_issues unless referenced_issues.empty?
   163	  end
   164	
   165	  def short_comments
   166	    @short_comments || split_comments.first
   167	  end
   168	
   169	  def long_comments
   170	    @long_comments || split_comments.last
   171	  end
   172	
   173	  def text_tag(ref_project=nil)
   174	    repo = ""
   175	    if repository && repository.identifier.present?
   176	      repo = "#{repository.identifier}|"
   177	    end
   178	    tag = scmid? ? "commit:#{repo}#{scmid}" : "#{repo}r#{revision}"
   179	    if ref_project && project && ref_project != project
   180	      tag = "#{project.identifier}:#{tag}"
   181	    end
   182	    tag
   183	  end
   184	
   185	  # Returns the title used for the changeset in the activity/search results

   187	    repo = (repository && repository.identifier.present?) ? " (#{repository.identifier})" : ''
   188	    comm = short_comments.blank? ? '' : (': ' + short_comments)
   189	    "#{l(:label_revision)} #{format_identifier}#{repo}#{comm}"
   190	  end
   191

   195	  end

   199	    @next ||= repository&.next_changeset(self)
   200	  end

   203	  def create_change(change)
   204	    Change.create(:changeset     => self,
   205	                  :action        => change[:action],
   206	                  :path          => change[:path],
   207	                  :from_path     => change[:from_path],
   208	                  :from_revision => change[:from_revision])
   209	  end
   210	
   211	  # Finds an issue that can be referenced by the commit message
   212	  def find_referenced_issue_by_id(id)
   213	    return nil if id.blank?
   214	
   215	    issue = Issue.find_by_id(id.to_i)
   216	    if Setting.commit_cross_project_ref?
   217	      # all issues can be referenced/fixed
   218	    elsif issue
   219	      # issue that belong to the repository project, a subproject or a parent project only
   220	      unless issue.project &&
   221	                (project == issue.project || project.is_ancestor_of?(issue.project) ||
   222	                 project.is_descendant_of?(issue.project))
   223	        issue = nil
   224	      end
   225	    end
   226	    issue
   227	  end
   228	
   229	  private
   230	
   231	  # Returns true if the issue is already linked to the same commit
   232	  # from a different repository
   233	  def issue_linked_to_same_commit?(issue)
   234	    repository.same_commits_in_scope(issue.changesets, self).any?
   235	  end
   236	
   237	  # Updates the +issue+ according to +action+
   238	  def fix_issue(issue, action)
   239	    # the issue may have been updated by the closure of another one (eg. duplicate)
   240	    issue.reload
   241	    # don't change the status is the issue is closed
   242	    return if issue.closed?
   243	
   244	    journal = issue.init_journal(user || User.anonymous,
   245	                                 ll(Setting.default_language,
   246	                                    :text_status_changed_by_changeset,
   247	                                    text_tag(issue.project)))
   248	    rule = Setting.commit_update_keywords_array.detect do |rule|
   249	      rule['keywords'].include?(action) &&
   250	        (rule['if_tracker_id'].blank? || rule['if_tracker_id'] == issue.tracker_id.to_s)
   251	    end
   252	    if rule
   253	      issue.assign_attributes rule.slice(*Issue.attribute_names)
   254	    end
   255	    Redmine::Hook.call_hook(:model_changeset_scan_commit_for_issue_ids_pre_issue_update,
   256	                            {:changeset => self, :issue => issue, :action => action})
   257	
   258	    if issue.changes.any?
   259	      unless issue.save
   260	        logger.warn("Issue ##{issue.id} could not be saved by changeset #{id}: #{issue.errors.full_messages}") if logger
   261	      end
   262	    else
   263	      issue.clear_journal
   264	    end
   265	    issue
   266	  end
   267	
   268	  def log_time(issue, hours)
   269	    time_entry =
   270	      TimeEntry.new(
   271	        :user => user,
   272	        :hours => hours,
   273	        :issue => issue,
   274	        :spent_on => commit_date,
   275	        :comments => l(:text_time_logged_by_changeset, :value => text_tag(issue.project),
   276	                       :locale => Setting.default_language)
   277	      )
   278	    if activity = issue.project.commit_logtime_activity
   279	      time_entry.activity = activity
   280	    end
   281	
   282	    unless time_entry.save
   283	      logger.warn("TimeEntry could not be created by changeset #{id}: #{time_entry.errors.full_messages}") if logger
   284	    end
   285	    time_entry
   286	  end
   287	
   288	  def split_comments
   289	    comments =~ /\A(.+?)\r?\n(.*)$/m
   290	    @short_comments = $1 || comments
   291	    @long_comments = $2.to_s.strip
   292	    [@short_comments, @long_comments]
   293	  end

   295	  # Singleton class method is public
   296	  class << self

   299	      Changeset.to_utf8(str.to_s, encoding).strip
   300	    end
   301	
   302	    def to_utf8(str, encoding)
   303	      Redmine::CodesetUtil.to_utf8(str, encoding)
   304	    end
   305	  end

   406	  # Raises a Unauthorized exception if one of the issues is not visible

   408	    @issues = Issue.
   409	      where(:id => (params[:id] || params[:ids])).
   410	      preload(:project, :status, :tracker, :priority,

   412	              {:custom_values => :custom_field}).
   413	      to_a
   414	    raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound if @issues.empty?
   415	    raise Unauthorized unless @issues.all?(&:visible?)
   416

   261	  # Bulk edit/copy a set of issues
   262	  def bulk_edit
   263	    @issues.sort!
   264	    @copy = params[:copy].present?
   265	    @notes = params[:notes]
   266	
   267	    if @copy
   268	      unless User.current.allowed_to?(:copy_issues, @projects)
   269	        raise ::Unauthorized
   270	      end
   271	    else
   272	      unless @issues.all?(&:attributes_editable?)
   273	        raise ::Unauthorized
   274	      end
   275	    end
   276	
   277	    edited_issues = Issue.where(:id => @issues.map(&:id)).to_a
   278	
   279	    @values_by_custom_field = {}
   280	    edited_issues.each do |issue|
   281	      issue.custom_field_values.each do |c|
   282	        if c.value_present?
   283	          @values_by_custom_field[c.custom_field] ||= []
   284	          @values_by_custom_field[c.custom_field] << issue.id
   285	        end
   286	      end
   287	    end
   288	
   289	    @allowed_projects = Issue.allowed_target_projects
   290	    if params[:issue]
   291	      @target_project = @allowed_projects.detect {|p| p.id.to_s == params[:issue][:project_id].to_s}
   292	      if @target_project
   293	        target_projects = [@target_project]
   294	        edited_issues.each {|issue| issue.project = @target_project}
   295	      end
   296	    end
   297	    target_projects ||= @projects
   298	
   299	    @trackers = target_projects.map {|p| Issue.allowed_target_trackers(p)}.reduce(:&)
   300	    if params[:issue]
   301	      @target_tracker = @trackers.detect {|t| t.id.to_s == params[:issue][:tracker_id].to_s}
   302	      if @target_tracker
   303	        edited_issues.each {|issue| issue.tracker = @target_tracker}
   304	      end
   305	    end
   306	
   307	    if @copy
   308	      # Copied issues will get their default statuses
   309	      @available_statuses = []
   310	    else
   311	      @available_statuses = edited_issues.map(&:new_statuses_allowed_to).reduce(:&)
   312	    end
   313	    if params[:issue]
   314	      @target_status = @available_statuses.detect {|t| t.id.to_s == params[:issue][:status_id].to_s}
   315	      if @target_status
   316	        edited_issues.each {|issue| issue.status = @target_status}
   317	      end
   318	    end
   319	
   320	    edited_issues.each do |issue|
   321	      issue.custom_field_values.each do |c|
   322	        if c.value_present? && @values_by_custom_field[c.custom_field]
   323	          @values_by_custom_field[c.custom_field].delete(issue.id)
   324	        end
   325	      end
   326	    end
   327	    @values_by_custom_field.delete_if {|k, v| v.blank?}
   328	    @custom_fields =
   329	      edited_issues.map{|i| i.editable_custom_fields}.
   330	        reduce(:&).select {|field| field.format.bulk_edit_supported}
   331	    @assignables = target_projects.map(&:assignable_users).reduce(:&)
   332	    @versions = target_projects.map {|p| p.shared_versions.open}.reduce(:&)
   333	    @categories = target_projects.map {|p| p.issue_categories}.reduce(:&)
   334	    if @copy
   335	      @attachments_present = @issues.detect {|i| i.attachments.any?}.present? &&
   336	                               (Setting.copy_attachments_on_issue_copy == 'ask')
   337	      @subtasks_present = @issues.detect {|i| !i.leaf?}.present?
   338	      @watchers_present = User.current.allowed_to?(:add_issue_watchers, @projects) &&
   339	                            Watcher.where(:watchable_type => 'Issue',
   340	                                          :watchable_id => @issues.map(&:id)).exists?
   341	    end
   342	
   343	    @safe_attributes = edited_issues.map(&:safe_attribute_names).reduce(:&)
   344	
   345	    @issue_params = params[:issue] || {}
   346	    @issue_params[:custom_field_values] ||= {}
   347	  end
   348	
   349	  def bulk_update
   350	    @issues.sort!
   351	    @copy = params[:copy].present?
   352	
   353	    attributes = parse_params_for_bulk_update(params[:issue])
   354	    copy_subtasks = (params[:copy_subtasks] == '1')
   355	    copy_watchers = (params[:copy_watchers] == '1')
   356	
   357	    if @copy
   358	      unless User.current.allowed_to?(:copy_issues, @projects)
   359	        raise ::Unauthorized
   360	      end
   361	
   362	      target_projects = @projects
   363	      if attributes['project_id'].present?
   364	        target_projects = Project.where(:id => attributes['project_id']).to_a
   365	      end
   366	      unless User.current.allowed_to?(:add_issues, target_projects)
   367	        raise ::Unauthorized
   368	      end
   369	
   370	      unless User.current.allowed_to?(:add_issue_watchers, @projects)
   371	        copy_watchers = false
   372	      end
   373	    else
   374	      unless @issues.all?(&:attributes_editable?)
   375	        raise ::Unauthorized
   376	      end
   377	    end
   378	
   379	    unsaved_issues = []
   380	    saved_issues = []
   381	
   382	    if @copy && copy_subtasks
   383	      # Descendant issues will be copied with the parent task
   384	      # Don't copy them twice
   385	      @issues.reject! {|issue| @issues.detect {|other| issue.is_descendant_of?(other)}}
   386	    end
   387	
   388	    @issues.each do |orig_issue|
   389	      orig_issue.reload
   390	      if @copy
   391	        issue = orig_issue.copy(
   392	          {},
   393	          :attachments => copy_attachments?(params[:copy_attachments]),
   394	          :subtasks => copy_subtasks,
   395	          :watchers => copy_watchers,
   396	          :link => link_copy?(params[:link_copy])
   397	        )
   398	      else
   399	        issue = orig_issue
   400	      end
   401	      journal = issue.init_journal(User.current, params[:notes])
   402	      issue.safe_attributes = attributes
   403	      call_hook(:controller_issues_bulk_edit_before_save, {:params => params, :issue => issue})
   404	      if issue.save
   405	        saved_issues << issue
   406	      else
   407	        unsaved_issues << orig_issue
   408	      end
   409	    end
   410	
   411	    if unsaved_issues.empty?
   412	      flash[:notice] = l(:notice_successful_update) unless saved_issues.empty?
   413	      if params[:follow]
   414	        if @issues.size == 1 && saved_issues.size == 1
   415	          redirect_to issue_path(saved_issues.first)
   416	        elsif saved_issues.map(&:project).uniq.size == 1
   417	          redirect_to project_issues_path(saved_issues.map(&:project).first)
   418	        end
   419	      else
   420	        redirect_back_or_default _project_issues_path(@project)
   421	      end
   422	    else
   423	      @saved_issues = @issues
   424	      @unsaved_issues = unsaved_issues
   425	      @issues = Issue.visible.where(:id => @unsaved_issues.map(&:id)).to_a
   426	      bulk_edit
   427	      render :action => 'bulk_edit'
   428	    end
   429	  end

   431	  def destroy
   432	    raise Unauthorized unless @issues.all?(&:deletable?)
   433	
   434	    # all issues and their descendants are about to be deleted
   435	    issues_and_descendants_ids = Issue.self_and_descendants(@issues).pluck(:id)
   436	    time_entries = TimeEntry.where(:issue_id => issues_and_descendants_ids)
   437	    @hours = time_entries.sum(:hours).to_f
   438	
   439	    if @hours > 0
   440	      case params[:todo]
   441	      when 'destroy'
   442	        # nothing to do
   443	      when 'nullify'
   444	        if Setting.timelog_required_fields.include?('issue_id')
   445	          flash.now[:error] = l(:field_issue) + " " + ::I18n.t('activerecord.errors.messages.blank')
   446	          return
   447	        else
   448	          time_entries.update_all(:issue_id => nil)
   449	        end
   450	      when 'reassign'
   451	        reassign_to = @project && @project.issues.find_by_id(params[:reassign_to_id])
   452	        if reassign_to.nil?
   453	          flash.now[:error] = l(:error_issue_not_found_in_project)
   454	          return
   455	        elsif issues_and_descendants_ids.include?(reassign_to.id)
   456	          flash.now[:error] = l(:error_cannot_reassign_time_entries_to_an_issue_about_to_be_deleted)
   457	          return
   458	        else
   459	          time_entries.update_all(:issue_id => reassign_to.id, :project_id => reassign_to.project_id)
   460	        end
   461	      else
   462	        # display the destroy form if it's a user request
   463	        return unless api_request?
   464	      end
   465	    end
   466	    @issues.each do |issue|
   467	      begin
   468	        issue.reload.destroy
   469	      rescue ::ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound # raised by #reload if issue no longer exists
   470	        # nothing to do, issue was already deleted (eg. by a parent)
   471	      end
   472	    end
   473	    respond_to do |format|
   474	      format.html do
   475	        flash[:notice] = l(:notice_successful_delete)
   476	        redirect_back_or_default _project_issues_path(@project)
   477	      end
   478	      format.api  {render_api_ok}
   479	    end
   480	  end

592	  def build_new_issue_from_params
   593	    @issue = Issue.new
   594	    if params[:copy_from]
   595	      begin
   596	        @issue.init_journal(User.current)
   597	        @copy_from = Issue.visible.find(params[:copy_from])
   598	        unless User.current.allowed_to?(:copy_issues, @copy_from.project)
   599	          raise ::Unauthorized
   600	        end
   601	
   602	        @link_copy = link_copy?(params[:link_copy]) || request.get?
   603	        @copy_attachments = copy_attachments?(params[:copy_attachments]) || request.get?
   604	        @copy_subtasks = params[:copy_subtasks].present? || request.get?
   605	        @copy_watchers = User.current.allowed_to?(:add_issue_watchers, @project)
   606	        @issue.copy_from(@copy_from, :attachments => @copy_attachments,
   607	                         :subtasks => @copy_subtasks, :watchers => @copy_watchers,
   608	                         :link => @link_copy)
   609	        @issue.parent_issue_id = @copy_from.parent_id
   610	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   611	        render_404
   612	        return
   613	      end
   614	    end
   615	    @issue.project = @project
   616	    if request.get?
   617	      @issue.project ||= @issue.allowed_target_projects.first
   618	    end
   619	    @issue.author ||= User.current
   620	    @issue.start_date ||= User.current.today if Setting.default_issue_start_date_to_creation_date?
   621	    offset = Setting.default_issue_due_date_offset_in_days
   622	    @issue.due_date ||= User.current.today + offset if offset
   623	
   624	    attrs = (params[:issue] || {}).deep_dup
   625	    if action_name == 'new' && params[:was_default_status] == attrs[:status_id]
   626	      attrs.delete(:status_id)
   627	    end
   628	    if action_name == 'new' && params[:form_update_triggered_by] == 'issue_project_id'
   629	      # Discard submitted version when changing the project on the issue form
   630	      # so we can use the default version for the new project
   631	      attrs.delete(:fixed_version_id)
   632	    end
   633	    if action_name == 'new' &&
   634	         %w[issue_project_id issue_tracker_id].include?(params[:form_update_triggered_by]) &&
   635	         attrs[:is_private] != '1'
   636	      # Drop the unchecked value so the selected tracker's private default can be applied.
   637	      attrs.delete(:is_private)
   638	    end
   639	    attrs[:assigned_to_id] = User.current.id if attrs[:assigned_to_id] == 'me'
   640	    @issue.safe_attributes = attrs
   641	
   642	    if @issue.project
   643	      @issue.tracker ||= @issue.allowed_target_trackers.first
   644	      if @issue.tracker.nil?
   645	        if @issue.project.trackers.any?
   646	          # None of the project trackers is allowed to the user
   647	          render_error :message => l(:error_no_tracker_allowed_for_new_issue_in_project), :status => 403
   648	        else
   649	          # Project has no trackers
   650	          render_error l(:error_no_tracker_in_project)
   651	        end
   652	        return false
   653	      end
   654	      if @issue.status.nil?
   655	        render_error l(:error_no_default_issue_status)
   656	        return false
   657	      end
   658	    elsif request.get?
   659	      render_error :message => l(:error_no_projects_with_tracker_allowed_for_new_issue), :status => 403
   660	      return false
   661	    end
   662	
   663	    @priorities = IssuePriority.active
   664	    @allowed_statuses = @issue.new_statuses_allowed_to(User.current)
   665	  end

   667	  # Saves @issue and a time_entry from the parameters
   668	  def save_issue_with_child_records
   669	    Issue.transaction do
   670	      if params[:time_entry] &&
   671	           (params[:time_entry][:hours].present? || params[:time_entry][:comments].present?) &&
   672	           User.current.allowed_to?(:log_time, @issue.project)
   673	        time_entry = @time_entry || TimeEntry.new
   674	        time_entry.project = @issue.project
   675	        time_entry.issue = @issue
   676	        time_entry.author = User.current
   677	        time_entry.user = User.current
   678	        time_entry.spent_on = User.current.today
   679	        time_entry.safe_attributes = params[:time_entry]
   680	        @issue.time_entries << time_entry
   681	      end
   682	      call_hook(
   683	        :controller_issues_edit_before_save,
   684	        {:params => params, :issue => @issue,
   685	         :time_entry => time_entry,
   686	         :journal => @issue.current_journal}
   687	      )
   688	      if @issue.save
   689	        call_hook(
   690	          :controller_issues_edit_after_save,
   691	          {:params => params, :issue => @issue,
   692	           :time_entry => time_entry,
   693	           :journal => @issue.current_journal}

    46	  def create
    47	    saved = false
    48	    params_relation = params[:relation]
    49	    unsaved_relations = []
    50	
    51	    relation_issues_to_id.each do |issue_to_id|

    53	
    54	      @relation = IssueRelation.new

    61	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotUnique

    64	
    65	      unsaved_relations << @relation unless saved
    66	    end

    68	    respond_to do |format|

    73	      end
    74	      format.api do
    75	        if saved
    76	          render :action => 'show', :status => :created, :location => relation_url(@relation)

    79	        end
    80	      end
    81	    end

    86	
    87	    @relation.init_journals(User.current)
    88	    @relation.destroy
    89	
    90	    respond_to do |format|

    92	      format.js do
    93	        find_issue
    94	        @relations = select_relations(@issue)
    95	      end
    96	      format.api  {render_api_ok}
    97	    end
    98	  end

   102	  def find_issue
   103	    @issue = Issue.find(params[:issue_id])
   104	    @project = @issue.project
   105	  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   106	    render_404
   107	  end
   108	
   109	  def find_relation
   110	    @relation = IssueRelation.find(params[:id])
   111	  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   112	    render_404
   113	  end
   114	
   115	  def relation_issues_to_id
   116	    issue_to_id = params[:relation].require(:issue_to_id)
   117	    case issue_to_id
   118	    when String
   119	      issue_to_id = issue_to_id.split(',').reject(&:blank?)
   120	    when Integer
   121	      issue_to_id = [issue_to_id]
   122	    end
   123	    issue_to_id
   124	  rescue ActionController::ParameterMissing => e
   125	    # We return a empty array just to loop once and return a validation error
   126	    # ToDo: Find a better method to return an error if the param is missing.
   127	    ['']
   128	  end
   129	
   130	  def select_relations(issue)
   131	    issue.reload.relations.select {|r| r.other_issue(issue) && r.other_issue(issue).visible?}
   132	  end
   133	end

20	class ContextMenusController < ApplicationController
    21	  helper :watchers
    22	  helper :issues
    23	
    24	  before_action :find_issues, :only => :issues
    25	  before_action :require_admin, :only => [:projects, :users]
    26	
    27	  def issues
    28	    if @issues.size == 1
    29	      @issue = @issues.first
    30	    end
    31	    @issue_ids = @issues.map(&:id).sort
    32	
    33	    @allowed_statuses = @issues.map(&:new_statuses_allowed_to).reduce(:&)
    34	
    35	    @can = {
    36	      :edit => @issues.all?(&:attributes_editable?),
    37	      :log_time => @issue&.time_loggable?,
    38	      :copy => User.current.allowed_to?(:copy_issues, @projects) && Issue.allowed_target_projects.any?,
    39	      :add_watchers => User.current.allowed_to?(:add_issue_watchers, @projects),
    40	      :delete => @issues.all?(&:deletable?),
    41	      :add_subtask => @issue && !@issue.closed? && User.current.allowed_to?(:manage_subtasks, @project)
    42	    }
    43	
    44	    @assignables = @issues.map(&:assignable_users).reduce(:&)
    45	    @trackers = @projects.map {|p| Issue.allowed_target_trackers(p)}.reduce(:&)
    46	    @versions = @projects.map {|p| p.shared_versions.open}.reduce(:&)
    47	
    48	    @priorities = IssuePriority.active.reverse
    49	    @back = back_url
    50	    begin
    51	      # Recognize the controller and action from the back_url to determine
    52	      # which view triggered the context menu.
    53	      if relative_url_root.present? && back_url&.starts_with?(relative_url_root)
    54	        normalized_back_url = back_url.delete_prefix(relative_url_root)
    55	      else
    56	        normalized_back_url = back_url
    57	      end
    58	      route = Rails.application.routes.recognize_path(normalized_back_url)
    59	      @include_delete =
    60	        [
    61	          {controller: 'issues', action: 'index'},
    62	          {controller: 'gantts', action: 'show'},
    63	          {controller: 'calendars', action: 'show'}
    64	        ].any?(route.slice(:controller, :action))
    65	    rescue ActionController::RoutingError
    66	      @include_delete = false
    67	    end
    68	
    69	    @columns = params[:c]
    70	
    71	    @options_by_custom_field = {}
    72	    if @can[:edit]
    73	      custom_fields = @issues.map(&:editable_custom_fields).reduce(:&).reject(&:multiple?).select {|field| field.format.bulk_edit_supported}
    74	      custom_fields.each do |field|
    75	        values = field.possible_values_options(@projects)
    76	        if values.present?
    77	          @options_by_custom_field[field] = values
    78	        end
    79	      end
    80	    end
    81	
    82	    @safe_attributes = @issues.map(&:safe_attribute_names).reduce(:&)
    83	    render :layout => false
    84	  end
    85

    87	    @time_entries = TimeEntry.where(:id => params[:ids]).
    88	      preload(:project => :time_entry_activities).
    89	      preload(:user).to_a
    90	
    91	    if @time_entries.blank? || !@time_entries.all?(&:visible?)
    92	      render_404;
    93	      return
    94	    end

    23	  def issues
    24	    issues = []
    25	    q = (params[:q] || params[:term]).to_s.strip
    26	    status = params[:status].to_s
    27	    issue_id = params[:issue_id].to_s
    28	
    29	    scope = Issue.cross_project_scope(@project, params[:scope]).includes(:tracker).visible
    30	    scope = scope.open(status == 'o') if status.present?
    31	    scope = scope.where.not(:id => issue_id.to_i) if issue_id.present?
    32	    if q.present?
    33	      if q =~ /\A#?(\d+)\z/
    34	        issues << scope.find_by(:id => $1.to_i)

    36	      issues += scope.like(q).order(:id => :desc).limit(10).to_a
    37	      issues.compact!
    38	    else
    39	      issues += scope.order(:id => :desc).limit(10).to_a
    40	    end

    42	    render :json => format_issues_json(issues)

    54	    wiki_pages =
    55	      if q.present?
    56	        scope.where("LOWER(#{WikiPage.table_name}.title) LIKE LOWER(?)", "%#{q}%").limit(10).to_a
    57	      else
    58	        scope.limit(10).to_a
    59	      end
    60	    render json: format_wiki_pages_json(wiki_pages)
    61	  end

    70	    render_404

Request handling is now mapped: normal issue routes go through `ApplicationController#find_issue(s)`, but relation/timelog/repository/autocomplete paths each have their own guards. I’m reading the query/report layer and rendering helpers because those are the places most likely to depend on Issue’s fields and tree semantics without mutating it.

   505	  def sql_for_notes_field(field, operator, value)
   506	    subquery = "SELECT 1 FROM #{Journal.table_name}" +
   507	      " WHERE #{Journal.table_name}.journalized_type='Issue' AND #{Journal.table_name}.journalized_id=#{Issue.table_name}.id" +
   508	      " AND (#{sql_for_field field, operator.delete_prefix('!'), value, Journal.table_name, 'notes'})" +
   509	      " AND (#{Journal.visible_notes_condition(User.current, :skip_pre_condition => true)})"
   510	    "#{operator.start_with?('!') ? "NOT EXISTS" : "EXISTS"} (#{subquery})"
   511	  end
   512	
   513	  def sql_for_updated_by_field(field, operator, value)
   514	    neg = (operator == '!' ? 'NOT' : '')
   515	    subquery = "SELECT 1 FROM #{Journal.table_name}" +
   516	      " WHERE #{Journal.table_name}.journalized_type='Issue' AND #{Journal.table_name}.journalized_id=#{Issue.table_name}.id" +
   517	      " AND (#{sql_for_field field, '=', value, Journal.table_name, 'user_id'})" +
   518	      " AND (#{Journal.visible_notes_condition(User.current, :skip_pre_condition => true)})"
   519	
   520	    "#{neg} EXISTS (#{subquery})"
   521	  end
   522	
   523	  def sql_for_last_updated_by_field(field, operator, value)
   524	    neg = (operator == '!' ? 'NOT' : '')
   525	    subquery = "SELECT 1 FROM #{Journal.table_name} sj" +
   526	      " WHERE sj.journalized_type='Issue' AND sj.journalized_id=#{Issue.table_name}.id AND (#{sql_for_field field, '=', value, 'sj', 'user_id'})" +
   527	      " AND sj.id IN (SELECT MAX(#{Journal.table_name}.id) FROM #{Journal.table_name}" +
   528	      "   WHERE #{Journal.table_name}.journalized_type='Issue' AND #{Journal.table_name}.journalized_id=#{Issue.table_name}.id" +
   529	      "   AND (#{Journal.visible_notes_condition(User.current, :skip_pre_condition => true)}))"
   530	
   531	    "#{neg} EXISTS (#{subquery})"
   532	  end

   534	  def sql_for_estimated_hours_field(field, operator, value)
   535	    sql_for_field("estimated_hours", operator, value.map(&:to_hours), Issue.table_name, "estimated_hours")

   538	  def sql_for_spent_time_field(field, operator, value)
   539	    first, second = value.first.to_s.to_hours, value.second.to_s.to_hours
   540	    sql_op =
   541	      case operator
   542	      when "=", ">=", "<=" then  "#{operator} #{first}"
   543	      when "><"            then  "BETWEEN #{first} AND #{second}"
   544	      when "*"             then  "> 0"
   545	      when "!*"            then  "= 0"
   546	      else
   547	        return nil
   548	      end
   549	    "COALESCE((" +
   550	      "SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(hours) AS DECIMAL(30,3)), 2) " +
   551	      "FROM #{TimeEntry.table_name} " +
   552	      "WHERE issue_id = #{Issue.table_name}.id), 0) #{sql_op}"
   553	  end
   554	
   555	  def sql_for_watcher_id_field(field, operator, value)
   556	    db_table = Watcher.table_name
   557	    me_ids = [0, User.current.id]
   558	    me_ids.concat(User.current.groups.pluck(:id))
   559	    me, others = value.partition {|id| me_ids.include?(id.to_i)}
   560	    sql =
   561	      if others.any?
   562	        "SELECT #{Issue.table_name}.id FROM #{Issue.table_name} " +
   563	        "INNER JOIN #{db_table} ON #{Issue.table_name}.id = #{db_table}.watchable_id AND #{db_table}.watchable_type = 'Issue' " +
   564	        "LEFT OUTER JOIN #{Project.table_name} ON #{Project.table_name}.id = #{Issue.table_name}.project_id " +
   565	        "WHERE (" +
   566	          sql_for_field(field, '=', me, db_table, 'user_id') +
   567	        ') OR (' +
   568	          Project.allowed_to_condition(User.current, :view_issue_watchers) +
   569	          ' AND ' +
   570	          sql_for_field(field, '=', others, db_table, 'user_id') +
   571	        ')'
   572	      else
   573	        "SELECT #{db_table}.watchable_id FROM #{db_table} " +
   574	        "WHERE #{db_table}.watchable_type='Issue' AND " +
   575	        sql_for_field(field, '=', me, db_table, 'user_id')
   576	      end
   577	    "#{Issue.table_name}.id #{ operator == '=' ? 'IN' : 'NOT IN' } (#{sql})"
   578	  end
   579	
   580	  def sql_for_member_of_group_field(field, operator, value)
   581	    if operator == '*' # Any group
   582	      groups = Group.givable
   583	      operator = '=' # Override the operator since we want to find by assigned_to
   584	    elsif operator == "!*"
   585	      groups = Group.givable
   586	      operator = '!' # Override the operator since we want to find by assigned_to
   587	    else
   588	      groups = Group.where(:id => value).to_a
   589	    end
   590	    groups ||= []
   591	
   592	    members_of_groups = groups.inject([]) do |user_ids, group|
   593	      user_ids + group.user_ids + [group.id]
   594	    end.uniq.compact.sort.collect(&:to_s)
   595	
   596	    '(' + sql_for_field("assigned_to_id", operator, members_of_groups, Issue.table_name, "assigned_to_id", false) + ')'
   597	  end

   599	  def sql_for_assigned_to_role_field(field, operator, value)
   600	    case operator
   601	    when "*", "!*" # Member / Not member
   602	      sw = operator == "!*" ? 'NOT' : ''
   603	      nl = operator == "!*" ? "#{Issue.table_name}.assigned_to_id IS NULL OR" : ''
   604	
   605	      subquery =
   606	        "SELECT 1" +
   607	        " FROM #{Member.table_name}" +
   608	        " WHERE #{Issue.table_name}.project_id = #{Member.table_name}.project_id AND #{Member.table_name}.user_id = #{Issue.table_name}.assigned_to_id"
   609	      "(#{nl} #{sw} EXISTS (#{subquery}))"
   610	    when "=", "!"
   611	      role_cond =
   612	        if value.any?
   613	          "#{MemberRole.table_name}.role_id IN (" + value.collect{|val| "'#{self.class.connection.quote_string(val)}'"}.join(",") + ")"
   614	        else
   615	          "1=0"
   616	        end
   617	      sw = operator == "!" ? 'NOT' : ''
   618	      nl = operator == "!" ? "#{Issue.table_name}.assigned_to_id IS NULL OR" : ''
   619	      subquery =
   620	        "SELECT 1" +
   621	        " FROM #{Member.table_name} inner join #{MemberRole.table_name} on members.id = member_roles.member_id" +
   622	        " WHERE #{Issue.table_name}.project_id = #{Member.table_name}.project_id AND #{Member.table_name}.user_id = #{Issue.table_name}.assigned_to_id AND #{role_cond}"
   623	      "(#{nl} #{sw} EXISTS (#{subquery}))"
   624	    end
   625	  end

   628	    groups = value.empty? ? Group.givable : Group.where(:id => value).to_a
   629	
   630	    author_groups = groups.inject([]) do |user_ids, group|
   631	      user_ids + group.user_ids + [group.id]
   632	    end.uniq.compact.sort.collect(&:to_s)
   633	
   634	    '(' + sql_for_field("author_id", operator, author_groups, Issue.table_name, "author_id", false) + ')'
   635	  end

   680	  def sql_for_attachment_field(field, operator, value)
   681	    case operator
   682	    when "*", "!*"
   683	      e = (operator == "*" ? "EXISTS" : "NOT EXISTS")
   684	      "#{e} (SELECT 1 FROM #{Attachment.table_name} a WHERE a.container_type = 'Issue' AND a.container_id = #{Issue.table_name}.id)"
   685	    when "~", "!~", "*~"
   686	      c = sql_contains("a.filename", value.first, :all_words => (operator != "*~"))
   687	      e = (operator == "!~" ? "NOT EXISTS" : "EXISTS")
   688	      "#{e} (SELECT 1 FROM #{Attachment.table_name} a WHERE a.container_type = 'Issue' AND a.container_id = #{Issue.table_name}.id AND (#{c}))"
   689	    when "^", "$"
   690	      c = sql_contains("a.filename", value.first, (operator == "^" ? :starts_with : :ends_with) => true)
   691	      "EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM #{Attachment.table_name} a WHERE a.container_type = 'Issue' AND a.container_id = #{Issue.table_name}.id AND (#{c}))"
   692	    end
   693	  end
   694	
   695	  def sql_for_attachment_description_field(field, operator, value)
   696	    cond_description = "a.description IS NOT NULL AND a.description <> ''"
   697	    c =
   698	      case operator
   699	      when '*', '!*'
   700	        (operator == '*' ? cond_description : "NOT (#{cond_description})")
   701	      when '~', '!~', '*~'
   702	        (operator == '~' ? '' : "#{cond_description} AND ") +
   703	        sql_contains('a.description', value.first, :match => (operator != '!~'), :all_words => (operator != '*~'))
   704	      when '^', '$'
   705	        sql_contains('a.description', value.first, (operator == '^' ? :starts_with : :ends_with) => true)
   706	      else
   707	        '1=0'
   708	      end
   709	    "EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM #{Attachment.table_name} a WHERE a.container_type = 'Issue' AND a.container_id = #{Issue.table_name}.id AND (#{c}))"
   710	  end
